raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The penalty for torturing a child can be as little as 7 years in prison.",
    "AB 1094 ramps up the minimum penalty for child torture to a minimum of 20 years with the possibility of life in prison.",
    "Individuals convicted of torture can be eligible for parole after just 7 years, with no consideration for the age of their victim.",
    "The current law fails victims of child torture.",
    "In some cases, children must prepare for their torturer's parole hearing while they are still children.",
    "The trauma endured by child torture victims is lifelong.",
    "10-year-old Natalie F. endured 17 surgeries to recover the use of her legs and is permanently disfigured due to torture.",
    "The crime of torture should have penalties that reflect the severity of the crime.",
    "Torture can take decades to recover from, and in some cases, victims never fully recover.",
    "Current law lightly punishes what is considered a war crime."
  ]
}
```
